token.description: An access token. This parameter cannot be used if any of `refresh_token`, `realm_name`, or `username` are used.

refresh_token.description: A refresh token. This parameter cannot be used if any of `refresh_token`, `realm_name`, or `username` are used.

realm_name.description: The name of an authentication realm. This parameter cannot be used with either `refresh_token` or `token`.

username.description: The username of a user. This parameter cannot be used with either `refresh_token` or `token`.
